faq.question: How much should an average window replacement cost?
faq.answer: In Fremont, with the current promotion quality vinyl replacement starts at $549 per window installed (regular $915), while fiberglass, clad-wood and architectural products price higher. The final number depends on window count, sizes, frame material and access, so Deluxe Windows prices each Fremont project after on-site measurements.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to replace windows in Fremont?
faq.answer: Permitting: Fremont follows standard California permitting, confirmed per project scope. Deluxe Windows verifies requirements with the building department and manages the paperwork for Fremont installations.
